weight_transform: none (op is weightless); when one operand is a per-channel weight/scale vector (e.g. RMSNorm gamma) it is reshaped to [1, 1, -1] or [1, 1, 1, -1] and converted to TILE_LAYOUT before the broadcast multiply; scalar operands may be passed as host Python floats

placement_observations.source: model call site: LLM MLP, w2_in = ttnn.multiply(w1_out, w3_out, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=w1_out.memory_config()) — output inherits input memory_config
model call site: RMSNorm — input converted via ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(inp, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before x*rsqrt and x*weight multiplies

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B*H, 1, seq_slice, seq_len] attention score slice (sliced/chunked attention, SD model)
placement_observations.source: model call site: mm_slice = ttnn.multiply(mm_slice, self.scale, memory_config=self.height_sharded_memory_config) followed by softmax_in_place

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, H, seq_len, seq_len] full attention scores (large seq, non-sliced fallback)
placement_observations.source: model call site: attn_weights = ttnn.multiply(attn_weights, reference_scalar, memory_config=dram_interleaved_memory_config)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, batch=32, hidden] decode-mode SSM state (small per-step tensor)
placement_observations.source: model call site: Mamba SSM decode — ttnn.multiply(abar2, hidden_states, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, output_tensor=abar2) (in-place, L1)
unit test: block_sharded_memory_config = ttnn.create_sharded_memory_config([32, 32], ...); result = ttnn.multiply(tt_in1, tt_in2, memory_config=block_sharded)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, L, C] channel-wise SE scale broadcast [B,1,C] over [B,L,C]
placement_observations.source: model call site: squeeze-excitation — ttnn.multiply(x_nlc, y, memory_config=dram)
